name: Split
description: Monitor Split feature flag platform for deployment control and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Split at https://app.split.io
2. Go to Admin Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new Admin API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Admin API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Split Admin Settings → API Keys (Admin key type)

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Split feature flags are configured to safely manage code changes

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Split workspace members with access to feature flag management
